site.service_4_desc: We don't just make content. We trace moments, fast ones, quiet ones.
site.service_3_desc: Identity, strategy, impact. Visual systems that hold up across every surface.
site.service_2_desc: Editorial, architectural, and commercial photography. Composition with intent.
site.service_1_desc: Cinematic. Professional. From concept to color, end-to-end direction for brand films, music videos, and commercials.
site.about_lead: Recroc is a small, focused studio with bases in New York and Los Angeles. We work with brands, artists, and architects who care about how things look — and how they feel.
site.about_body: Every project starts with a question, not a brief. We're interested in restraint, in patience, and in the kind of craft that holds up at 4K and at thumbnail size.
site.hero_desc: A US-based visual studio working at the intersection of cinema, photography, and brand storytelling — for clients who want to be remembered.

projects.tagline: A pulse through the city after dark.
projects.title: Neon Nights
projects.description: Cinematic music video shot over three nights across downtown Los Angeles.

projects.title: Concrete Bloom
projects.description: Architectural photography commission documenting a residential brutalist project in Chicago.

projects.title: Pulse
projects.description: 30-second hero spot for a performance apparel launch.
